With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After the dismembered remains of a missing woman are found in a freezer, investigators uncover a love triangle and a murderous conspiracy to conceal the truth.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: Witness to Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: Investigators trying to determine who shot and killed a young mother in Ohio are tipped off by a surprising piece of digital evidence. They unravel a twisted story of stalking and social media catfishing.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A man arrested at sea tries to swim away from police; a man wearing a blue bonnet steals baby formula; a mom goes to extreme measures with a housemate and is arrested for assault.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A hyped-up man goes toe-to-toe with police; a woman flips off fellow drivers while dancing in the street; a pilot is arrested for allegedly stealing a plane; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: The family of Miya Marcano share the agonising details of what happened around the beautiful 19-year-old's disappearance.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: A young man is arrested for violating a restraining order by sending a text message. While in Virginia Beach, an 18-year-old woman is arrested for assault and battery after a fight with her brother.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: A popular lifeguard is found dead at the community swimming pool, causing a wave of terror to flood through Leawood, Kansas.

programme.title: Murder At the Motel
programme.desc: November 23, 2014, Springfield, Oregon. A housekeeper at the Village Inn Motel calls police when she finds a guest unresponsive and cold to the touch.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: The judge must excuse the jury after an accused double-murderer goes on a rant; DUI defendant won't listen to her lawyer; laundromat vandal tries to suck up to the judge; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted quadruple murderer argues with the judge; a pastor who stole from his church hears it from a member of his congregation; a man who murdered his grandparents becomes disorderly in the courtroom.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Known for the murders of University of Florida students, Danny Rolling's first killings were in his hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana. He longed for a loving family, but he destroyed one instead.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: Summer around the Lake of the Ozarks heats up as Corporal Stephen Riner tries to stop a curious case of road rage. K9 officer Corporal Caleb Harvey and Donzi search a vehicle they believe has narcotics.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: After a teacher is gunned down in broad daylight, Gwinnett detectives must track down the suspects, with only their getaway car’s description. The prosecution must overcome the threat of a mistrial.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a party becomes the scene of a murder. For investigators and prosecutors, the case is riding on two accomplices betraying their friends, despite the risks.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a man is gunned down in front of his family, and it's up to Det. Jermaine Rogers to sift through differing accounts of the incident to find the truth.

programme.desc: Talakayin ang mga pangngalan, panghalip, iba't ibang bahagi ng aklat, diksyunaryo, at elemento ng kuwento. Alamin rin ang pagbabasa at pagbabaybay ng mga salita.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Learn about whole numbers up to 10 000, ordinal numbers up to 100th, money up to PhP1000, and how to perform addition and subtraction to whole numbers, including money.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Discover different kinds of sentences, descriptive paragraphs, and diaries, as well as where to use common and proper nouns, plural forms of regular and irregular nouns, and how to read words with short vowels.

programme.desc: Aralin ang wastong paggamit ng pangngalan, panghalip, magagalang na pananalita, at mga sanggunian. Alamin rin ang wastong pagsagot sa mga tanong, pabigay ng hinuha, opinyon, solusyon, pagsunod-sunod ng mga pangyayari, at pagsuri ng maikling pelikula.

programme.title: Grade 6 Math
programme.desc: Learn the four fundamental operations involving fractions and decimals.

programme.title: Grade 6 English
